feedback.text: Good evening, I think it would be generally beneficial if this law also covered the protection of video games being effectively destroyed due to either being pulled from virtual storefronts, having existing games removed from peoples libraries (this sometimes happens when the first example occurs) or having a game be rendered nonfunctional by the servers large vital components are hosted, all I think would be required is the mandate of end of life plans and ideally protections against companies de-listing or removing games from storefronts or libraries without good cause.
